---
pagetitle: "David A. Marinelarena"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
section-divs: false
listing:
  - id: recent-projects
    contents: projects/*/index.qmd
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, title, date]
    image-height: 130px
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
<img src="assets/img/dam.jpg" alt="David A. Marinelarena" class="hero-avatar">
<div class="hero-text">
<div class="hero-name" role="heading" aria-level="1">DAVID A. MARINELARENA</div>
<p class="hero-tagline">"BIOLOGICAL RESEARCHER · PhD STUDENT ASU SOLS"</p>
<div class="hero-socials">
<a href="https://github.com/Amarine9331" aria-label="GitHub" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
<a href="https://x.com/Amarine9331" aria-label="Twitter" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-twitter"></i></a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/david-andrew-marinelarena/" aria-label="LinkedIn" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xzyk_aQAAAAJ&amp;hl=en" aria-label="Google Scholar" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i></a>
<a href="files/David_A_CV_Aug2025.pdf" aria-label="CV" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i></a>
</div>
</div>
</section>
```

::: {.section-label}
// about
:::

I'm a **Computational Biologist and Biotechnology Professional**, currently an **MCB PhD student** at **Arizona State University**.

My research sits at the intersection of **computational biology, microbiome science, multi-omics, bioinformatics, and machine learning** — developing and applying computational methods to analyze complex biological datasets and build a more complete portrait of biological systems.

I aim to keep building computational tools and conducting research that benefits both scientists and patients.

::: {.section-label}
// focus
:::

```{=html}
<div class="tag-row">
<span class="tag">MULTI-OMICS</span>
<span class="tag">MICROBIOME</span>
<span class="tag">BIOINFORMATICS</span>
<span class="tag">MACHINE LEARNING</span>
<span class="tag">BIOTECHNOLOGY</span>
</div>
```

::: {.section-label}
// scope
:::

```{=html}
<section class="research-scope" aria-label="Research scope">
<div class="research-copy">

<div class="scope-item">
<h2>SOP mechanisms and memory of stress response in microbial communities</h2>
<p>Environmental stressors induce rapid transcriptional, metabolic, and compositional shifts that can leave short-term ecological memory within microbial communities. I aim to integrate multi-omic methodologies to quantify which functional products appear, how long they persist, and over what timescales communities transition through disturbance and recovery. A central question is whether these responses are predictable and generalizable across different biological systems and perturbations.</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item">
<h2>Linking phylogeny to stress</h2>
<p>Stress events often reshape the genomic context of microbial populations, altering the microbial composition and distribution of mobile elements, accessory genes, and horizontally transferred loci that mediate adaptation. I am interested in how these genomic features reorganize functional potential during environmental pulses, and how lineage-specific traits map onto chemical and metabolite pulses.</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item">
<h2>Bioprospecting following stress response</h2>
<p>A tertiary aim is to discover and characterize novel genes, enzymes, and small molecules that confer stress tolerance or facilitate rapid recovery in their host or ecosystem. Through comparative multi-omics, I will identify candidate loci and products enriched during stress pulses and experimentally validate them using heterologous expression and quantitative assays. This integrative pipeline bridges discovery and application, linking ecological resilience to synthetic biology, natural product discovery, bioremediation, and biotechnological innovation.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="dna-scroll" aria-hidden="true">
<svg class="dna-helix" viewBox="0 0 80 600" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<g class="helix-rotor">
<path class="backbone" d="M 40 0 C 65 0 65 75 40 75 C 15 75 15 150 40 150 C 65 150 65 225 40 225 C 15 225 15 300 40 300 C 65 300 65 375 40 375 C 15 375 15 450 40 450 C 65 450 65 525 40 525 C 15 525 15 600 40 600"/>
<path class="backbone" d="M 40 0 C 15 0 15 75 40 75 C 65 75 65 150 40 150 C 15 150 15 225 40 225 C 65 225 65 300 40 300 C 15 300 15 375 40 375 C 65 375 65 450 40 450 C 15 450 15 525 40 525 C 65 525 65 600 40 600"/>

<g class="bp" transform="translate(0,37.5)">
<g class="hbonds h2"><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="-1.6" y2="-1.6"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="1.6" y2="1.6"/></g>
<g class="base purine left" transform="translate(15,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-6 5.2,-3 5.2,3 0,6 -5.2,3 -5.2,-3"/><polygon class="ring fused" points="-5.2,-3 -9,-2 -10.5,0 -9,2 -5.2,3"/><text class="label" x="0" y="2.2">A</text></g>
<g class="base pyrimidine right" transform="translate(65,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-5 4.3,-2.5 4.3,2.5 0,5 -4.3,2.5 -4.3,-2.5"/><text class="label" x="0" y="1.9">T</text></g>
</g>

<g class="bp" transform="translate(0,112.5)">
<g class="hbonds h3"><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="-2.6" y2="-2.6"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="0" y2="0"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="2.6" y2="2.6"/></g>
<g class="base pyrimidine left" transform="translate(15,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-5 4.3,-2.5 4.3,2.5 0,5 -4.3,2.5 -4.3,-2.5"/><text class="label" x="0" y="1.9">C</text></g>
<g class="base purine right" transform="translate(65,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-6 5.2,-3 5.2,3 0,6 -5.2,3 -5.2,-3"/><polygon class="ring fused" points="5.2,-3 9,-2 10.5,0 9,2 5.2,3"/><text class="label" x="0" y="2.2">G</text></g>
</g>

<g class="bp" transform="translate(0,187.5)">
<g class="hbonds h2"><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="-1.6" y2="-1.6"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="1.6" y2="1.6"/></g>
<g class="base pyrimidine left" transform="translate(15,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-5 4.3,-2.5 4.3,2.5 0,5 -4.3,2.5 -4.3,-2.5"/><text class="label" x="0" y="1.9">T</text></g>
<g class="base purine right" transform="translate(65,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-6 5.2,-3 5.2,3 0,6 -5.2,3 -5.2,-3"/><polygon class="ring fused" points="5.2,-3 9,-2 10.5,0 9,2 5.2,3"/><text class="label" x="0" y="2.2">A</text></g>
</g>

<g class="bp" transform="translate(0,262.5)">
<g class="hbonds h3"><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="-2.6" y2="-2.6"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="0" y2="0"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="2.6" y2="2.6"/></g>
<g class="base purine left" transform="translate(15,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-6 5.2,-3 5.2,3 0,6 -5.2,3 -5.2,-3"/><polygon class="ring fused" points="-5.2,-3 -9,-2 -10.5,0 -9,2 -5.2,3"/><text class="label" x="0" y="2.2">G</text></g>
<g class="base pyrimidine right" transform="translate(65,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-5 4.3,-2.5 4.3,2.5 0,5 -4.3,2.5 -4.3,-2.5"/><text class="label" x="0" y="1.9">C</text></g>
</g>

<g class="bp" transform="translate(0,337.5)">
<g class="hbonds h2"><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="-1.6" y2="-1.6"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="1.6" y2="1.6"/></g>
<g class="base purine left" transform="translate(15,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-6 5.2,-3 5.2,3 0,6 -5.2,3 -5.2,-3"/><polygon class="ring fused" points="-5.2,-3 -9,-2 -10.5,0 -9,2 -5.2,3"/><text class="label" x="0" y="2.2">A</text></g>
<g class="base pyrimidine right" transform="translate(65,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-5 4.3,-2.5 4.3,2.5 0,5 -4.3,2.5 -4.3,-2.5"/><text class="label" x="0" y="1.9">T</text></g>
</g>

<g class="bp" transform="translate(0,412.5)">
<g class="hbonds h3"><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="-2.6" y2="-2.6"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="0" y2="0"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="2.6" y2="2.6"/></g>
<g class="base pyrimidine left" transform="translate(15,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-5 4.3,-2.5 4.3,2.5 0,5 -4.3,2.5 -4.3,-2.5"/><text class="label" x="0" y="1.9">C</text></g>
<g class="base purine right" transform="translate(65,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-6 5.2,-3 5.2,3 0,6 -5.2,3 -5.2,-3"/><polygon class="ring fused" points="5.2,-3 9,-2 10.5,0 9,2 5.2,3"/><text class="label" x="0" y="2.2">G</text></g>
</g>

<g class="bp" transform="translate(0,487.5)">
<g class="hbonds h2"><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="-1.6" y2="-1.6"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="1.6" y2="1.6"/></g>
<g class="base pyrimidine left" transform="translate(15,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-5 4.3,-2.5 4.3,2.5 0,5 -4.3,2.5 -4.3,-2.5"/><text class="label" x="0" y="1.9">T</text></g>
<g class="base purine right" transform="translate(65,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-6 5.2,-3 5.2,3 0,6 -5.2,3 -5.2,-3"/><polygon class="ring fused" points="5.2,-3 9,-2 10.5,0 9,2 5.2,3"/><text class="label" x="0" y="2.2">A</text></g>
</g>

<g class="bp" transform="translate(0,562.5)">
<g class="hbonds h3"><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="-2.6" y2="-2.6"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="0" y2="0"/><line x1="23" x2="57" y1="2.6" y2="2.6"/></g>
<g class="base purine left" transform="translate(15,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-6 5.2,-3 5.2,3 0,6 -5.2,3 -5.2,-3"/><polygon class="ring fused" points="-5.2,-3 -9,-2 -10.5,0 -9,2 -5.2,3"/><text class="label" x="0" y="2.2">G</text></g>
<g class="base pyrimidine right" transform="translate(65,0)"><polygon class="ring" points="0,-5 4.3,-2.5 4.3,2.5 0,5 -4.3,2.5 -4.3,-2.5"/><text class="label" x="0" y="1.9">C</text></g>
</g>

</g>
</svg>
</div>
</section>
```

::: {.section-label}
// timeline
:::

```{=html}
<!-- TODO: confirm exact date ranges against current CV -->
<div class="timeline">

<div class="timeline-row">
<div class="timeline-date">2024 — Present</div>
<div class="timeline-content">
<div class="timeline-title">Graduate Researcher · Qiyun Lab, Arizona State University<img class="timeline-logo" src="assets/img/orgs/asu.png" alt="ASU"></div>
<div class="timeline-desc">Doctoral research in computational biology, microbiome multi-omics, bioinformatics, and machine-learning methods.</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-row">
<div class="timeline-date">2024 — 2026</div>
<div class="timeline-content">
<div class="timeline-title">M.S. Computational Life Sciences · Arizona State University<img class="timeline-logo" src="assets/img/orgs/asu.png" alt="ASU"></div>
<div class="timeline-desc">Statistical modeling, bioinformatics, and machine learning across genomics, transcriptomics, proteomics, and other omics data.</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-row">
<div class="timeline-date">2023 — 2025</div>
<div class="timeline-content">
<div class="timeline-title">Quality Control Specialist → Research Associate II · Roche<img class="timeline-logo" src="assets/img/orgs/roche.png" alt="Roche"></div>
<div class="timeline-desc">Routine release testing of multiplexed syndromic diagnostic panels. Designed and executed experiments to expand molecular diagnostic assay offerings.</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-row">
<div class="timeline-date">2021 — 2022</div>
<div class="timeline-content">
<div class="timeline-title">Quality Control Associate I · TriLink Biotechnologies<img class="timeline-logo" src="assets/img/orgs/trilink.png" alt="TriLink"></div>
<div class="timeline-desc">Release testing of RNA capping reagents and small molecules.</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-row">
<div class="timeline-date">2018 — 2022</div>
<div class="timeline-content">
<div class="timeline-title">B.S. Biological Sciences · California State University, San Marcos<img class="timeline-logo" src="assets/img/orgs/csusm.png" alt="CSUSM"></div>
<div class="timeline-desc"></div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
```

::: {.section-label}
// recent
:::

::: {#recent-projects}
:::
